name: Vikram Rathore
summary: Vikram talks about the Army Technical Entry Scheme and how his strong focus on Physics & Maths concepts helped in GTO tasks and personal interview.
data: The Technical Entry Scheme (TES) direct entry depends on your JEE Mains rank and 12th PCM marks. My SSB was at Bhopal. In GTO, I noticed many candidates try to dominate the group. The secret is to help your teammates, listen, and offer practical structures for the plank and rope tasks. During the personal interview, the officer asked me multiple questions about mechanics, basic thermodynamics, and structural mechanics, which I explained using simple practical examples. Keep your fitness levels high, practice running, and build upper body strength for the individual obstacles.
